property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-22\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Python314\;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\windows\System32\Wbem;C:\windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\MinGW\bin;C:\Program Files\HP\HP One Agent;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-22\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Program Files\MongoDB\Server\8.0\bin;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.13\bin;;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Users\hi\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python310\Scripts\;C:\Users\hi\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python310\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\hi\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\Scripts\;C:\Users\hi\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\;C:\Users\hi\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\hi\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\hi\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\hi\AppData\Local\Programs\mongosh\;C:\Users\hi\AppData\Roaming\npm;.

testcase.name: testEarthquakeTriggerAboveThreshold
testcase.system-out: 🚨 Setting up Emergency Alert System Tests

testcase.name: testAlertGenerationValid
testcase.system-out: ✅ ALERT GENERATED: [2026-03-29 15:31:35] EARTHQUAKE - Test Earthquake: Test message (Severity: HIGH, Location: Test Location) Recipients: 4 contacts

testcase.name: testAlertGenerationInvalid
testcase.system-out: Conditions not met for alert: EARTHQUAKE

testcase.name: testAlertHistoryTracking
testcase.system-out: ✅ ALERT GENERATED: [2026-03-29 15:31:35] EARTHQUAKE - Test: Message (Severity: HIGH, Location: Location) Recipients: 4 contacts

testcase.name: testPerfectNotificationReliability
testcase.system-out:
🔔 PUSH sent to test@example.com: Test 📱 SMS sent to test@example.com: Test 🚨 SIREN activated at test@example.com for FIRE 📧 EMAIL sent to test@example.com: Test
📊 Notification Summary for Alert e87883ff: Success rate: 100.0%

testcase.name: testNotificationRetryMechanism
testcase.system-out:
🚨 SIREN activated at test@example.com for FIRE
📊 Notification Summary for Alert cef6ba59: Success rate: 25.0%
testcase.system-err: ❌ EMAIL failed to test@example.com ❌ SMS failed to test@example.com ❌ PUSH failed to test@example.com ❌ EMAIL failed to test@example.com ❌ PUSH failed to test@example.com ❌ SMS failed to test@example.com ❌ PUSH failed to test@example.com ❌ EMAIL failed to test@example.com ❌ SMS failed to test@example.com

testcase.name: testMultipleRecipientsNotification
testcase.system-out:
📧 EMAIL sent to recipient1@test.com: Test 📱 SMS sent to recipient1@test.com: Test 🔔 PUSH sent to recipient1@test.com: Test 🚨 SIREN activated at recipient1@test.com for EARTHQUAKE 📱 SMS sent to recipient2@test.com: Test 📧 EMAIL sent to recipient2@test.com: Test 🔔 PUSH sent to recipient2@test.com: Test 🚨 SIREN activated at recipient2@test.com for EARTHQUAKE 🚨 SIREN activated at +1-555-0001 for EARTHQUAKE 🔔 PUSH sent to +1-555-0001: Test 📱 SMS sent to +1-555-0001: Test 📧 EMAIL sent to +1-555-0001: Test
📊 Notification Summary for Alert 31534509: Success rate: 100.0%

testcase.name: testEndToEndAlertFlow
testcase.system-out:
✅ ALERT GENERATED: [2026-03-29 15:31:41] EARTHQUAKE - E2E Test Earthquake: Testing full flow (Severity: HIGH, Location: Test City) Recipients: 4 contacts 📧 EMAIL sent to 911-dispatch@testcity.gov: E2E Test Earthquake 📱 SMS sent to 911-dispatch@testcity.gov: E2E Test Earthquake 🚨 SIREN activated at 911-dispatch@testcity.gov for EARTHQUAKE 🔔 PUSH sent to 911-dispatch@testcity.gov: E2E Test Earthquake 🚨 SIREN activated at local-authorities@testcity.gov for EARTHQUAKE 📧 EMAIL sent to emergency-services@response.gov: E2E Test Earthquake 📱 SMS sent to emergency-services@response.gov: E2E Test Earthquake 🔔 PUSH sent to emergency-services@response.gov: E2E Test Earthquake 🚨 SIREN activated at emergency-services@response.gov for EARTHQUAKE 📧 EMAIL sent to +1-800-EMERGENCY: E2E Test Earthquake 📱 SMS sent to +1-800-EMERGENCY: E2E Test Earthquake 🔔 PUSH sent to +1-800-EMERGENCY: E2E Test Earthquake 🚨 SIREN activated at +1-800-EMERGENCY for EARTHQUAKE 📧 EMAIL sent to local-authorities@testcity.gov: E2E Test Earthquake 📱 SMS sent to local-authorities@testcity.gov: E2E Test Earthquake 🔔 PUSH sent to local-authorities@testcity.gov: E2E Test Earthquake
📊 Notification Summary for Alert 32aeb669: Success rate: 100.0% Successful notifications: 16/16 Emergency Alert System shutdown complete

testcase.name: testAlertCancellation
testcase.system-out:
✅ ALERT GENERATED: [2026-03-29 15:31:42] EARTHQUAKE - Cancellable Alert: This alert will be cancelled (Severity: HIGH, Location: Test City) Recipients: 4 contacts 📧 EMAIL sent to 911-dispatch@testcity.gov: Cancellable Alert 📱 SMS sent to 911-dispatch@testcity.gov: Cancellable Alert 🔔 PUSH sent to 911-dispatch@testcity.gov: Cancellable Alert 📧 EMAIL sent to +1-800-EMERGENCY: Cancellable Alert 🚨 SIREN activated at 911-dispatch@testcity.gov for EARTHQUAKE 🚨 SIREN activated at local-authorities@testcity.gov for EARTHQUAKE 🔔 PUSH sent to local-authorities@testcity.gov: Cancellable Alert 📧 EMAIL sent to emergency-services@response.gov: Cancellable Alert 🔔 PUSH sent to emergency-services@response.gov: Cancellable Alert 📱 SMS sent to +1-800-EMERGENCY: Cancellable Alert 🚨 SIREN activated at emergency-services@response.gov for EARTHQUAKE 📱 SMS sent to emergency-services@response.gov: Cancellable Alert 🔔 PUSH sent to +1-800-EMERGENCY: Cancellable Alert 🚨 SIREN activated at +1-800-EMERGENCY for EARTHQUAKE 📱 SMS sent to local-authorities@testcity.gov: Cancellable Alert 📧 EMAIL sent to local-authorities@testcity.gov: Cancellable Alert
📊 Notification Summary for Alert 4ef03f82: Success rate: 100.0% Successful notifications: 16/16 ❌ Alert 4ef03f82 has been CANCELLED Emergency Alert System shutdown complete

testcase.name: testRecipientsBySeverity
testcase.system-out:
✅ ALERT GENERATED: [2026-03-29 15:31:43] EARTHQUAKE - Critical: Msg (Severity: CRITICAL, Location: City) Recipients: 8 contacts
✅ ALERT GENERATED: [2026-03-29 15:31:43] EARTHQUAKE - Low: Msg (Severity: MEDIUM, Location: City) Recipients: 3 contacts

testcase.name: testConcurrentAlertGeneration
testcase.system-out:
✅ ALERT GENERATED: [2026-03-29 15:31:43] EARTHQUAKE - Concurrent Test: Concurrent message (Severity: HIGH, Location: City)
✅ ALERT GENERATED: [2026-03-29 15:31:43] EARTHQUAKE - Concurrent Test: Concurrent message (Severity: HIGH, Location: City) Recipients: 4 contacts Recipients: 4 contacts
✅ ALERT GENERATED: [2026-03-29 15:31:43] EARTHQUAKE - Concurrent Test: Concurrent message (Severity: HIGH, Location: City)
✅ ALERT GENERATED: [2026-03-29 15:31:43] EARTHQUAKE - Concurrent Test: Concurrent message (Severity: HIGH, Location: City) Recipients: 4 contacts Recipients: 4 contacts
